stemHtml:
Refer to figure or ALICANTE - chart 10-2G from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
Which approach is possible on Runway 28?

options.a: Continuous Descent Arrival via CALLES, KOVAM and VILNA
options.b: Continuous Descent Arrival via CALLES, KOVAM and BESOR
options.c: Continuous Descent Arrival via VALENCIA and VILNA
options.d: Continuous Descent Arrival via CALLES and VILNA
